transcript.text:
[It's night time]
[Mafia, put your head up]
[An innocent beef has been murdered]
[Run...]
[We're actually camping]
Can she really finish this?
[Main attribute: carnivorous]
I should've unbuckled my belt
[Tomahawk steak]
I can't give up now
[There's still so much food left]
[Camper Lv. 1: Tzuyang]
[Cooler full of meat]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Jebu Island
I received this much meat

So I'm here for camping
[Previous night]
[Unlimited choice of meat]
I chose all the ones I wanted
I picked a lot
The campsite here is really pretty Let's go
[Jebu Island: GlamB Glamping]
I don't know how to put up a tent
Ta-da
[Picked a Motorhome RV]
[Reveal]
400g of Outside Skirt
2 Montreal Seasoning Steaks
200g of Chuck Flap
800g of Hanging Tender
1 Texas Seasoning Steak

Wagyu Chuck Short Rib
2 Tomahawk Steaks
All the meat is from the U.S.
[7kg of meat]
This is a lot of food
Can she really eat it all?
All of this weighs 7kg
It'll be too much for me to eat
I will share with the people here
[Goodbye Tomahawk Steak]
Little bit of everything
This looks good
But...
That looks good too This?
[Don't want to give too much]
I'll give you more later

I've been robbed
Let's start cooking
The fire is too strong right now
So let's start with the small pieces first
I feel like I will burn the big pieces
The small pieces are the outside skirt and hanging tender
The hanging tender is a tad bit bigger
The smaller one is the outside skirt
Let's cook 1 short rib too
Check out the marbling on this
[Let's see it together]
The marbling
Wagyu short rib
Looks scrumptious
Let's try it
Bon appetit

What? It's so good
The meat is so tender
The hanging tender now
It's so tender
It melts in my mouth
The meat just cuts off
Not tough at all
Very tender
Tender yet chewy
I don't think I've ever camped out like this alone
Short ribs
The texture seems chewy
It's very chewy
So delicious
Really
This time,

Chuck flap steak
It's thick, right?
Chuck flap steak
I absolutely love the chuck flap
It's not even greasy
Not sure about the chuck flap Let's try it
The inside is still raw
How do I cook this?
Let's cook that for a while
And cook this on the side
Short ribs and outside skirt
No! It's mine
Let's put a steak on the grill
It's cooking slow now
I'm so happy right now
Oh no!

To be honest,
I try not to exaggerate too much when it's a paid promotion
But this is just too tasty
Don't think it's ready yet
Wait, I think that's good enough
Rare to maybe medium-rare?
With some steak sauce
So good
The chuck flap became well-done
It's even better
It's just very flavorful
Foodjang let me order this much food for me to eat
I remember the price being very reasonable
All these beef are suitable for camping and cookouts
This one is perfectly cooked
I want to cut it like a steak

I have a knife, but I don't have a fork
It won't cut
Sad to cut steak with scissors
The juice is dripping
Yummy
This is the Top Blade (Flat Iron Steak)
It looks really good
I think it's ready
I feel like this one's ready too
Did I cook it for too long?
I like it medium-rare
Short rib
Is delicious
The top blade is so good
I don't like this part because it's usually dry
[How long have I been eating for?]

I can't leave here until 8:30pm
We need to wait for the water to get lower to take the ship out of here
I think it'll be 8:30 by the time I finish
Should I just spend the night here?
Is it finally time for the tomahawk steak?
I bet you people are watching this just for the tomahawk
It's so huge
I hope the grill doesn't break
It's firing up
They cooked it so well over there
[For Foodjang members and staff]
Can we trade?
I can cook it better
Closing the cover will help it cook all around, right?
Then I get cold
It's getting chilly already

I didn't know the top blade was this good
I think I could've finished the 7kg by myself
The smoke
This one is cooked well-done
It is..
[Disappointed]
What? It's so good
Hanging tender on the side
The smaller one is the outside skirt
The fire is starting to die
The charcoal always loses
That's amazing
I think the hanging tender tastes the best
Actually, the short ribs
I really love the texture
The juice explosion

Now for the outside skirt
This tastes amazing too
I can't really rank them
They're all 1st place
It's so cold
I can't
[Hiding in the camping car]
I will sleep here tonight
Let's not go home
[Abandoned]
[To the rescue]
[Wait a minute]
[He flipped the steak for you]
He did? Thank you
[They're great people]
[Straight to the mouth]

Delicious
The meat on top looks like the ribeye cap
It is
The proper way to eat this is as a whole
But this one is too big, so I'll cut it up
Cut out the ribeye cap
This is the size of the ribeye cap
It's huge
I have to finish the rib finger meat too
Let's cut it up
This is so much food
They said it won't be tough even if I cook it well-done
How's that?
[Good job]
It's almost ready
The meat juice

It really is delicious
Is this the ribeye cap?
This might be our rank #1
So tasty
It's so good How's this even possible?
The ship will be able to depart soon
So we need to hurry
[I'll give you more]
[Not the ribeye cap]
["Thank you for sharing your food with us" -Tzuyang's staff team]
Yum
Let's hurry and cook
It's not greasy at all
I feel like I can eat nonstop
[Aren't you tired yet?]
Last piece of bone

So big
This is the rib finger meat
This has to be eaten
It's hot
Can I cool it off for a bit?
I've eaten a lot of pork meat at a campsite before
But it was my first time eating beef
It's camping season soon
So if you're looking for something to cook out here
I would recommend using Foodjang for the cookout beef
And also, they said they would like to give a little benefit to my subscribers
Go on their website, sign up, and go to 'My Page'
Write 'Tzuyang쯔양' as your coupon for benefits
If you like beef, you should definitely try it
I will finish the rest now
